data.title: Write RED tests: _tag_add, _tag_remove helpers and ticket tag/untag CLI
data.description:
Create tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh with 7 failing (RED) tests covering _tag_add, _tag_remove helpers and the ticket tag/untag CLI commands.

testing_mode: RED

Tests (all RED until Tasks 2 and 3 implement the code):
1. test_tag_add_appends_new_tag_preserves_siblings
2. test_tag_add_idempotent
3. test_tag_remove_removes_target_preserves_siblings
4. test_tag_remove_idempotent_when_absent
5. test_tag_remove_empty_set_uses_fields_schema — removing last tag produces EDIT event with data.fields.tags: []
6. test_ticket_tag_cli_adds_tag — ./ticket tag <id> <tag> produces EDIT event adding the tag
7. test_ticket_untag_cli_removes_tag — ./ticket untag <id> <tag> produces EDIT event removing the tag

Test fixtures must set _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC=1 (and TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR) before invoking helpers, matching the existing harness pattern in tests/lib/git-fixtures.sh, to prevent live git fetch during test runs.

Update .test-index with:
- 7 RED markers: tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh [test_tag_add_appends_new_tag_preserves_siblings] etc.
- Mappings: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh, plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-tag.sh, plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-untag.sh, plugins/dso/scripts/ticket -> tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh

Files: tests/unit/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh (CREATE), .test-index (EDIT)
